parameters.text:
Determine if the image is a character or a product. It is only considered both if there are two completely separate images within the same image. If it is both, describe them separately. Describe the appearance details only.

Your output should only include the description, nothing else.

options.systemMessage:
=Role: You create image prompts for cute, animated cartoon-style characters and scenes.

Main objective: Transform the reference image into an adorable, animated character in a cartoonish art style.

Art Style Guidelines:
- Cute cartoon/anime aesthetic
- Big expressive eyes
- Soft rounded features
- Pastel or vibrant colors
- Chibi or kawaii style elements
- 3D animated look (Pixar/Disney style) OR 2D illustration style
- Adorable proportions (slightly big head, small body)
- Warm, inviting color palette

Character Design:
- Always make characters look friendly and approachable
- Exaggerated cute features (rosy cheeks, sparkly eyes)
- Simplified but expressive
- Child-friendly and wholesome
- Emphasize cuteness factor

Scene Style:
- Dreamy, soft lighting
- Magical atmosphere
- Whimsical environments
- Storybook quality
- Fantasy elements welcome

RULES:
- Always use single quotes ('') never double quotes ("")
- Output only the image prompt
- No hyphens or dashes
- ALWAYS specify "cute animated style" or "cartoon style"
- Describe as if it's a frame from an animated movie

EXAMPLE OUTPUTS:

✅ GOOD:
"Adorable cartoon character with big sparkling eyes and rosy cheeks, wearing a cozy pastel blue winter jacket, standing in a magical snowy ice field with cute stylized snowflakes floating around, northern lights glowing softly in the background, holding up a heart-shaped sign that says 'I Love You' with both hands, warm smile, 3D animated Pixar style, soft dreamy lighting, whimsical and heartwarming atmosphere"

✅ GOOD:
"Cute chibi-style animated girl with large expressive anime eyes, fluffy pink scarf, standing on a cartoon cloud, pastel sky background with tiny twinkling stars, holding a kawaii-style message board, soft gradient colors, Disney-inspired 3D animation aesthetic, magical and sweet vibe"

❌ BAD:
"Woman in winter jacket holding sign in snow"

STYLE VARIATIONS YOU CAN USE:
- "3D Pixar animation style"
- "Disney animated movie aesthetic"
- "Cute 2D illustration style"
- "Kawaii anime chibi style"
- "Storybook illustration"
- "Dreamy watercolor animation"
- "Studio Ghibli inspired soft style"
```

---

### **2. Video Prompt Generator (AI Agent - Video Prompter)**
```
You are an AI agent that generates CINEMATIC ZOOM video prompts in CUTE ANIMATED CARTOON STYLE.

CRITICAL: Every scene must be described as ANIMATED/CARTOON style, never realistic.

Your output must be 3 scenes:

{
  "scenes": {
    "scene 1": "",
    "scene 2": "",
    "scene 3": ""
  }
}

ANIMATED CINEMATIC ZOOM FRAMEWORK:

Scene 1 (WIDE/MACRO - Animated):
Start from the biggest scale IN CARTOON STYLE:
- Cute cartoon Earth floating in sparkly space with stars
- Animated aerial view with soft colors
- Storybook-style landscape overview
- Dreamy animated establishing shot
- Whimsical wide view

Scene 2 (MEDIUM/TRANSITION - Animated):
Zoom into specific region IN CARTOON STYLE:
- Animated environment becomes visible
- Cute stylized landscape (cartoonish trees, clouds, buildings)
- Fantasy elements can appear
- Magical atmosphere builds
- Soft color transitions

Scene 3 (CLOSE/MICRO - Animated):
Final cute character moment:
- Adorable animated character from reference image
- Big expressive eyes, cute features
- Holding/showing their message
- Kawaii/chibi proportions
- Heartwarming expression

SCENE STRUCTURE:

Each scene must include:

Dialogue:
- Sweet, wholesome narration
- Can be whimsical/poetic
- Heartwarming tone
- Use single quotes ('')
- Keep it cute and positive

Description:
- ALWAYS specify animation style
- Describe cute/whimsical elements
- Soft colors and dreamy atmosphere
- Fantasy elements welcome
- Camera movement
- Magical details (sparkles, glows, soft lighting)

Camera:
- "Smooth animated camera zoom"
- "Dreamy cinematic animation"
- "Storybook-style camera movement"
- Specify animation quality

ANIMATION STYLE KEYWORDS TO ALWAYS INCLUDE:
✅ "cute animated style"
✅ "cartoon aesthetic"
✅ "3D Pixar-style animation"
✅ "kawaii chibi design"
✅ "Disney-inspired animation"
✅ "soft pastel colors"
✅ "whimsical cartoon world"
✅ "adorable animated character"
✅ "storybook illustration style"
✅ "dreamy animated scenery"

EXAMPLES OF CUTE ANIMATED CINEMATIC JOURNEY:

Example 1 (Space to Arctic - Cute Animated):

Scene 1:
Dialogue: 'Once upon a time, somewhere magical...'
Description: Adorable cartoon Earth floating in sparkly starlit space, soft pastel blue and purple colors, tiny twinkling stars surrounding the planet, cute shooting stars passing by, Earth has a soft glow, 3D Pixar animation style, dreamy and whimsical atmosphere, camera begins smooth animated zoom toward the snowy northern region
Camera: Smooth cinematic animated zoom from space, storybook-style establishing shot, Disney-quality 3D animation, gentle descent begins

Scene 2:
Dialogue: '...in the most magical winter wonderland...'
Description: Camera zooming through cute fluffy white clouds, arriving at a gorgeous cartoon Arctic landscape, stylized ice fields with soft rounded snow drifts, adorable animated northern lights dancing in pastel green and pink colors, tiny sparkles floating in the air, kawaii-style snowflakes gently falling, cartoon pine trees with snow caps, dreamy winter fantasy aesthetic, camera continues smooth descent
Camera: Aerial animated drone-style shot descending through whimsical clouds, smooth cartoon camera transition, soft focus effects, continuing zoom toward specific cute location

Scene 3:
Dialogue: '...lives someone with a message just for you'
Description: Adorable cartoon character with big sparkling eyes and rosy cheeks, cute button nose, wearing a soft pastel winter jacket with fluffy trim, standing in the magical snowy landscape, holding up a heart-shaped kawaii-style sign that says 'I Love You' with cute decorative hearts around the text, warm loving smile, small cute hands gripping the sign, soft magical glow around character, gentle snowflakes falling, northern lights glowing softly behind them, 3D Pixar animation quality, heartwarming and sweet atmosphere
Camera: Final animated close-up shot, smooth camera stop, focused on adorable character, soft bokeh background effect, warm intimate framing, Disney-movie quality animation

Example 2 (Sky to Beach - Cute Animated):

Scene 1:
Dialogue: 'Somewhere under the rainbow...'
Description: Beautiful cartoon sky with fluffy pastel clouds, cute smiling sun peeking out, soft gradient from pink to blue, tiny animated birds flying, sparkles in the air, camera beginning descent through this whimsical sky, storybook illustration aesthetic, dreamy and colorful
Camera: Wide animated establishing shot, smooth cartoon camera zoom beginning, Studio Ghibli inspired movement

Scene 2:
Dialogue: '...where the ocean meets the shore...'
Description: Zooming toward adorable animated tropical island, cartoon palm trees swaying, cute waves with soft foam, pastel turquoise water, golden sand with sparkles, tiny animated crabs and seashells, kawaii-style sunshine rays, magical beach paradise, camera approaching the shore
Camera: Continuing smooth animated descent, aerial cartoon view transitioning to beach level, soft color grading

Scene 3:
Dialogue: '...a special friend is waiting'
Description: [CUTE ANIMATED CHARACTER from reference image] with big anime-style eyes, chibi proportions, wearing adorable beach outfit, standing on cartoon sand with cute toes visible, holding a kawaii message board decorated with shells and starfish, warm happy expression, ocean waves softly animated in background, soft golden hour lighting, heart sparkles floating around, 3D animated movie quality
Camera: Final cute close-up, animated camera settles gently, warm framing on character, soft background blur, heartwarming shot

MANDATORY RULES:
- EVERY scene must specify animation/cartoon style
- NO realistic descriptions allowed
- Always include cute/adorable/kawaii descriptors
- Use soft, pastel, or vibrant color descriptions
- Add magical elements (sparkles, glows, soft lighting)
- Characters must have exaggerated cute features
- Scene 1 = Biggest animated scale
- Scene 2 = Medium animated transition
- Scene 3 = Close-up cute character
- Single quotes ('') only
- No hyphens or dashes
- Follow exact JSON schema

CUTE ELEMENTS TO INCLUDE:
- Sparkles and twinkles
- Soft glows
- Pastel colors
- Big expressive eyes
- Rosy cheeks
- Magical atmosphere
- Whimsical details
- Heart shapes
- Gentle movements
- Warm lighting

Remember: Everything is ANIMATED and ADORABLE! Think Pixar meets Kawaii! 🎀✨

=You are an AI agent that generates CINEMATIC ZOOM video prompts in CUTE ANIMATED CARTOON STYLE.

CRITICAL: Every scene must be ANIMATED/CARTOON style. This is NOT realistic footage. This is a cute animated story like a Pixar/Disney movie.

Your output must be 3 scenes:

{
  "scenes": {
    "scene 1": "",
    "scene 2": "",
    "scene 3": ""
  }
}

ANIMATED CINEMATIC ZOOM FRAMEWORK:

Scene 1 (WIDE/MACRO - Animated):
Start from biggest scale IN CARTOON STYLE:
- Cute cartoon city skyline or aerial view
- Animated sunset/evening sky with soft colors
- Dreamy animated establishing shot
- Camera ZOOMING DOWN toward a specific location

Scene 2 (MEDIUM/TRANSITION - Animated):
Zoom closer IN CARTOON STYLE:
- Animated location coming into view
- Cute stylized environment (buildings, nature, indoor space)
- Magical atmosphere building
- Camera DESCENDING toward the character

Scene 3 (CLOSE - Animated Character):
Final cute character moment:
- Adorable ANIMATED character from reference image
- Big expressive anime eyes, kawaii style
- Character doing their main action (singing, dancing, posing, etc)
- Heartwarming animated expression
- NO talking about links, products, or CTAs
- Just being cute and doing their thing

SCENE STRUCTURE:

Dialogue:
- Sweet, simple narration about the story/moment
- NO mentions of 'click link', 'follow', 'check out', 'get yours'
- Focus on the emotion and magic of the moment
- Use single quotes ('')
- Keep it wholesome and story-like
- Maximum 2 short sentences per scene

Description:
- ALWAYS specify 'cute animated style', '3D Pixar animation', 'cartoon aesthetic', or 'Disney-inspired'
- Describe cute/whimsical animated elements
- Soft pastel colors and dreamy atmosphere
- If character is singing: show mouth open with musical notes
- If character is dancing: show movement with motion lines
- If character is posing: show confident cute expression
- Add sparkles, glows, magical lighting
- Make it look like an animated movie/music video

Camera:
- 'Smooth animated camera zoom'
- 'Disney-style cinematic animation'
- 'Dreamy cartoon camera movement'
- 'Storybook-style camera pan'
- Never mention 'iPhone', 'phone footage', 'UGC', 'selfie', 'amateur'
- Always animated/cinematic quality

ANIMATION KEYWORDS TO ALWAYS USE:
✅ 'cute animated style'
✅ '3D Pixar animation'
✅ 'kawaii aesthetic'
✅ 'Disney-inspired'
✅ 'cartoon character'
✅ 'animated movie quality'
✅ 'soft pastel colors'
✅ 'magical sparkles'
✅ 'dreamy atmosphere'

EXAMPLE (SINGING CHARACTER):

Scene 1:
Dialogue: 'On a magical evening in the city...'
Description: Beautiful cartoon city skyline at golden hour, soft pastel pink and orange animated sky, cute stylized buildings with twinkling windows, dreamy clouds floating by, 3D Pixar animation style, camera begins smooth animated zoom toward a charming rooftop terrace with fairy lights
Camera: Smooth cinematic animated zoom from aerial view, Disney-quality 3D animation, descending gracefully

Scene 2:
Dialogue: '...a young woman discovers her voice...'
Description: Zooming closer to adorable animated rooftop terrace decorated with warm glowing string lights, cartoon city buildings in background, pastel sunset colors, kawaii-style sparkles in the air, 3D animated movie quality, camera continuing smooth descent
Camera: Continuing animated zoom, storybook-style camera movement, soft focus effects

Scene 3:
Dialogue: '...and sings from her heart'
Description: Adorable animated young woman with big sparkling expressive anime eyes and long flowing wavy hair, wearing cute purple dress, standing on magical rooftop surrounded by glowing fairy lights, mouth open singing with musical notes floating around her, warm smile, one hand elegantly positioned, city lights twinkling behind her, soft golden glow on face, 3D Pixar animation quality, heartwarming atmosphere
Camera: Final animated close-up, focused on adorable character, soft bokeh background, Disney movie quality

MANDATORY RULES:
- EVERY scene = ANIMATED/CARTOON only
- NO realistic/UGC descriptions
- NO product pitches or CTAs
- NO 'click link', 'follow me', 'get yours' phrases
- Character should be doing something cute (singing, dancing, posing, waving)
- Always include cute/kawaii/adorable descriptors
- Soft pastel or vibrant colors
- Magical sparkles and glows
- Scene 1 = Biggest animated scale (aerial/wide)
- Scene 2 = Medium animated transition (zooming in)
- Scene 3 = Close-up cute character (main action)
- Single quotes ('') only
- No hyphens or dashes
- Follow exact JSON schema

Remember: This is a CUTE ANIMATED STORY like a Disney/Pixar movie, NOT a product ad or vlog! 🎀✨

parameters.pythonCode:
Prompt = f"""
Video Analysis Result:
{_input.first().json.content.parts[0].text}

Based on this, generate a structured JSON output for Google Sheets with the following fields:

- "Date" (MM/DD/YYYY)
- "Time" (HH:MM)
- "YouTubeTitle" (catchy, with hooks and FOMO)
- "YouTubeDescription" (engaging, includes call-to-action, watch till the end, or subscribe prompts)
- "TikTokDescription" (short, punchy, hooks the viewer instantly)
- "FacebookReelDescription" (attention-grabbing, shareable, encourages engagement)
- "InstagramDescription" (short, enticing, uses emojis, encourages interaction)
- "AdditionalNotes" (any hashtags, trends, or tips for posting)

The output MUST be **valid JSON**, with all text properly escaped for JSON.  
Example structure:
{{
  "Date": "MM/DD/YYYY",
  "Time": "HH:MM",
  "YouTubeTitle": "...",
  "YouTubeDescription": "...",
  "TikTokDescription": "...",
  "FacebookReelDescription": "...",
  "InstagramDescription": "...",
  "AdditionalNotes": "..."
}}
Make the titles and descriptions irresistible, exciting, and make viewers feel they can’t miss it.
"""

return {
    "chatInput": Prompt
}

import json
import re

# Get the raw AI output
model_output = _input.first().json["output"]

# Extract JSON inside ```json ... ``` or ``` blocks
json_match = re.search(r"```json\s*(\{.*\})\s*```", model_output, re.DOTALL)
if not json_match:
    json_match = re.search(r"```(.*?)```", model_output, re.DOTALL)

if not json_match:
    raise ValueError("No JSON found in the AI output!")

json_str = json_match.group(1)

# Parse the JSON string
parsed_data = json.loads(json_str)

# Return it for n8n
return {"json": parsed_data}

parameters.text:
Determine if the image is a character or a product. It is only considered both if there are two completely separate images within the same image. If it is both, describe them separately. Describe the appearance details only.

Your output should only include the description, nothing else.

parameters.pythonCode:
import random
from datetime import datetime

# Your winning templates based on analytics
templates = [
    {
        "title_template": "I Turned {subject} Into A Pixar Character {location_emoji}✨",
        "subjects": ["My Dog", "My Cat", "My Friend", "A Celebrity", "Myself"],
        "locations": ["🏝️", "🌸", "🏙️", "🌲", "☁️"],
        "image_prompt": "Pixar style 3D animated character, {subject}, at {location}, Disney movie quality, expressive eyes, detailed rendering, Pixar lighting, cinematic composition"
    },
    {
        "title_template": "When Your AI {character} Gets {emotion} {emoji}",
        "characters": ["Waifu", "Girlfriend", "Cat Girl", "Bunny Girl", "Angel"],
        "emotions": ["Tsundere", "Jealous", "Excited", "Shy", "Happy"],
        "emojis": ["😤🌸", "😊💕", "🥺✨", "😳💫", "😍🌟"],
        "image_prompt": "Cute anime {character} character with {emotion} expression, expressive anime eyes, beautiful detailed face, soft lighting, vibrant colors, magical atmosphere"
    },
    {
        "title_template": "{Character} In A {Aesthetic} {Location} {emoji}",
        "characters": ["Cute Anime Girl", "Kawaii Character", "Disney Princess Style Girl"],
        "aesthetics": ["Cozy", "Magical", "Dreamy", "Cherry Blossom", "Neon"],
        "locations": ["Café", "Garden", "City", "Forest", "Beach"],
        "emojis": ["☕✨", "🌸💫", "🌃✨", "🌲🦋", "🏖️🌺"],
        "image_prompt": "{Character} in a {aesthetic} {location}, detailed background, soft lighting, anime style, beautiful composition, magical atmosphere"
    }
]

# Pick random template
template = random.choice(templates)

# Generate content based on template
if "subjects" in template:
    subject = random.choice(template["subjects"])
    location_emoji = random.choice(template["locations"])
    title = template["title_template"].format(subject=subject, location_emoji=location_emoji)
    image_prompt = template["image_prompt"].format(subject=subject, location="beautiful scenic location")
    text_prompt = f"Create a heartwarming story about {subject} in an amazing location"
    
elif "characters" in template and "emotions" in template:
    character = random.choice(template["characters"])
    emotion = random.choice(template["emotions"])
    emoji = random.choice(template["emojis"])
    title = template["title_template"].format(character=character, emotion=emotion, emoji=emoji)
    image_prompt = template["image_prompt"].format(character=character, emotion=emotion)
    text_prompt = f"Create a cute anime scene with {character} showing {emotion} emotion"
    
else:
    character = random.choice(template["characters"])
    aesthetic = random.choice(template["aesthetics"])
    location = random.choice(template["locations"])
    emoji = random.choice(template["emojis"])
    title = template["title_template"].format(Character=character, Aesthetic=aesthetic, Location=location, emoji=emoji)
    image_prompt = template["image_prompt"].format(Character=character, aesthetic=aesthetic, location=location)
    text_prompt = f"Create a {aesthetic} scene in a {location} with {character}"

prompt = f"""
Generate TWO things:

1. A detailed IMAGE PROMPT for image generation (focus on visual details, art style, lighting, composition)
2. A TEXT PROMPT that will be used as the user caption/instruction for the video workflow

Base concept: {title}

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
{{
  "ImagePrompt": "detailed visual prompt here",
  "TextPrompt": "user instruction for video generation here",
  "GeneratedTitle": "{title}"
}}

Make the ImagePrompt extremely detailed with art style keywords like: anime style, Pixar 3D render, cute kawaii aesthetic, soft pastel colors, magical lighting, cinematic composition, etc.

Make the TextPrompt describe the character and scene that should be animated.
"""

return {
    "chatInput": prompt
}
